headline: Tage Thompson is scoring 87% above expectations
body: Tage Thompson has scored 44 goals against an expected 23.5 this season (+20.5 goals above expected). Historical data suggests deviations this large tend to normalize.
social_text: Tage Thompson is scoring at 1.87x expected (+20.5 GAx). History says this won't last.

headlines.title: NHL Predictions: Washington Capitals vs New Jersey Devils
